case_title: BONSI, EDUARDO VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (C/O M. ANDERSON)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (C/O M. ANDERSON) THIS COURT LACKS JURISDICATION TO GRANT RELIEF REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BONSI, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (C/O M. ANDERSON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (C/O M. ANDERSON)
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-03-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-17-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THE CASE.
